creator: rsimmons@mail.wlcg.com
text:
The ntp.conf(5) man page is a little bit confusing.  It could be less
confusing if a break was placed after the first description of the
manycastclient arguments.

This break would be put around line 128 of src/usr.sbin/ntp/doc/ntp.conf.5

Fix: 

Put some whitespace before line 128 of src/usr.sbin/ntp/doc/ntp.conf.5
How-To-Repeat: n/a
